commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a CLI wizard i18n catalog with locale fallback, wires setup/onboarding and bundled channel setup copy through translator helpers, exposes a setup SDK translator, adds tests, and documents locale selection.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is feature work. Source inspection on current main confirms the wizard still has English-only setup prompts and no `OPENCLAW_LOCALE` or wizard i18n module.
